Bash(node -e "require\(''http''\).get\(''http://localhost:3001'', r => console.log\(r.statusCode\)\).on\(''error'', e => console.log\(''port free:'', e.code\)\)")
Bash(cmd /c "wmic process where ""CommandLine like ''%auth-service%'' or CommandLine like ''%dist/main%'' or CommandLine like ''%dist\\main%''"" get ProcessId,CommandLine 2>&1")

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process -Name node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, CPU | Format-Table; Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3001 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object LocalPort, OwningProcess")

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3001 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Write-Host ''Cleared''")
Bash(powershell -Command "$conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3001 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conn\) { Stop-Process -Id $conn.OwningProcess -Force }; Write-Host ''OK''")
Bash(powershell -NonInteractive -Command "Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5433 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object LocalPort, OwningProcess, State")
Bash(cmd /c "wmic process where processid=9136 get name,commandline")
Bash(PGPASSWORD=root psql -h 127.0.0.1 -p 5434 -U root -d dashboard -c "SELECT * FROM ""Tenant"" LIMIT 5;")

Bash(node -e "const { PrismaClient } = require\(''@prisma/client''\); const p = new PrismaClient\(\); p.tenant.findMany\(\).then\(t => console.log\(JSON.stringify\(t\)\)\).then\(\(\) => p.$disconnect\(\)\).catch\(e => { console.error\(e.message\); p.$disconnect\(\); }\);")

Bash(node -e "const { PrismaClient } = require\(''@prisma/client''\); const p = new PrismaClient\(\); p.tenant.findMany\(\).then\(t => { console.log\(JSON.stringify\(t\)\); p[''$disconnect'']\(\); }\).catch\(e => { console.error\(e.message\); p[''$disconnect'']\(\); }\);")

Bash(node -e "const { PrismaClient } = require\(''./packages/database''\); const p = new PrismaClient\(\); p.tenant.findMany\(\).then\(t => console.log\(JSON.stringify\(t,null,2\)\)\).catch\(e => console.error\(e.message\)\).finally\(\(\) => p.$disconnect\(\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const{Client}=require\(''pg''\);const c=new Client\(''postgresql://root:root@127.0.0.1:5434/dashboard''\);c.connect\(\).then\(\(\)=>c.query\(""SELECT schemaname, tablename FROM pg_tables WHERE tablename ILIKE ''%tenant%''""\)\).then\(r=>console.log\(JSON.stringify\(r.rows\)\)\).catch\(e=>console.error\(e.message\)\).finally\(\(\)=>c.end\(\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const{Client}=require\(''pg''\);const c=new Client\(''postgresql://root:root@127.0.0.1:5434/dashboard''\);c.connect\(\).then\(\(\)=>c.query\(''SELECT id, name FROM auth.""Tenant"" LIMIT 5''\)\).then\(r=>console.log\(JSON.stringify\(r.rows,null,2\)\)\).catch\(e=>console.error\(e.message\)\).finally\(\(\)=>c.end\(\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const{Client}=require\(''pg''\);const c=new Client\(''postgresql://root:root@127.0.0.1:5434/dashboard''\);c.connect\(\).then\(\(\)=>c.query\(""SELECT schemaname, tablename FROM pg_tables WHERE schemaname IN \(''auth'',''finance'',''public''\) ORDER BY schemaname, tablename""\)\).then\(r=>console.log\(JSON.stringify\(r.rows\)\)\).catch\(e=>console.error\(e.message\)\).finally\(\(\)=>c.end\(\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const{Client}=require\(''pg''\);const c=new Client\(''postgresql://root:root@127.0.0.1:5434/dashboard''\);c.connect\(\).then\(\(\)=>c.query\(''SELECT id, name, ""tenantId"" FROM finance.""Company"" LIMIT 5''\)\).then\(r=>console.log\(JSON.stringify\(r.rows,null,2\)\)\).catch\(e=>console.error\(e.message\)\).finally\(\(\)=>c.end\(\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const{Client}=require\(''pg''\);const c=new Client\(''postgresql://root:root@127.0.0.1:5434/dashboard''\);c.connect\(\).then\(\(\)=>c.query\(''SELECT id, name, ""iikoGroupId"", ""companyId"" FROM finance.""Brand"" LIMIT 10''\)\).then\(r=>console.log\(JSON.stringify\(r.rows,null,2\)\)\).catch\(e=>console.error\(e.message\)\).finally\(\(\)=>c.end\(\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const{Client}=require\(''pg''\);const c=new Client\(''postgresql://root:root@127.0.0.1:5434/dashboard''\);c.connect\(\).then\(\(\)=>c.query\(''SELECT id, name, ""iikoId"", ""brandId"", ""isActive"" FROM finance.""Restaurant"" LIMIT 20''\)\).then\(r=>console.log\(JSON.stringify\(r.rows,null,2\)\)\).catch\(e=>console.error\(e.message\)\).finally\(\(\)=>c.end\(\)\)")

Bash(cmd.exe /c "docker exec dashboard-postgres psql -U root -d dashboard -c ""SELECT ''auth.User'' as tbl, COUNT\(*\) FROM auth.User UNION ALL SELECT ''auth.Tenant'', COUNT\(*\) FROM auth.Tenant UNION ALL SELECT ''finance.Brand'', COUNT\(*\) FROM finance.Brand UNION ALL SELECT ''finance.Restaurant'', COUNT\(*\) FROM finance.Restaurant UNION ALL SELECT ''finance.Company'', COUNT\(*\) FROM finance.Company UNION ALL SELECT ''finance.Expense'', COUNT\(*\) FROM finance.Expense UNION ALL SELECT ''finance.FinancialSnapshot'', COUNT\(*\) FROM finance.FinancialSnapshot UNION ALL SELECT ''finance.DdsArticle'', COUNT\(*\) FROM finance.DdsArticle;""")

Bash(cmd.exe /c "docker exec dashboard-postgres psql -U root -d dashboard -c ""SELECT ''auth.User'' as tbl, COUNT\(*\) FROM auth.\\""User\\"" UNION ALL SELECT ''auth.Tenant'', COUNT\(*\) FROM auth.\\""Tenant\\"" UNION ALL SELECT ''finance.Brand'', COUNT\(*\) FROM finance.\\""Brand\\"" UNION ALL SELECT ''finance.Restaurant'', COUNT\(*\) FROM finance.\\""Restaurant\\"" UNION ALL SELECT ''finance.Company'', COUNT\(*\) FROM finance.\\""Company\\"" UNION ALL SELECT ''finance.Expense'', COUNT\(*\) FROM finance.\\""Expense\\"" UNION ALL SELECT ''finance.FinancialSnapshot'', COUNT\(*\) FROM finance.\\""FinancialSnapshot\\"" UNION ALL SELECT ''finance.DdsArticle'', COUNT\(*\) FROM finance.\\""DdsArticle\\"";""")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=root "/c/Program Files/PostgreSQL/15/bin/psql" -h 127.0.0.1 -p 5434 -U root -d dashboard -c "SELECT pt.""iikoCode"", pt.name, COUNT\(sp.id\) as snapshot_count, SUM\(sp.amount\) as total FROM finance.""PaymentType"" pt LEFT JOIN finance.""SnapshotPayment"" sp ON sp.""paymentTypeId"" = pt.id GROUP BY pt.id, pt.""iikoCode"", pt.name ORDER BY total DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 20;")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\(''fs''\); const d=JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\(''D:/kexgroupapp/apps/web-dashboard/build/agent-status.json'',''utf8''\)\); console.log\(''lastUpdated:'', d.lastUpdated\); console.log\(''phases:'', d.phases.length\); console.log\(''total tasks:'', d.phases.reduce\(\(s,p\)=>s+p.tasks.length,0\)\);")
